nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Rufous-lored kingfisher
nodes.summary: Rufous-lored kingfisher（Rufous-lored kingfisher，学名 Todiramphus winchelli），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于薩馬島、塔布拉斯島，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 塔布拉斯島
nodes.summary: 塔布拉斯島是菲律賓的島嶼，位於民都洛南部以東約50公里，由朗布隆省負責管轄，最高點海拔高度665米，主要經濟活動有稻米種植和漁業，2007年人口154,413。

nodes.name: 薩馬島
nodes.summary: 薩馬島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Philippine eagle-owl、Pinsker's hawk-eagle等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is endemic to the Philippines, ranging from Samar and Tablas south to Mindanao, Basilan and the Sulu Archipelago. It appears to be locally common on some islands, but it is rare in other localities. It lives in forest below in elevation, being found in coastal lowlands and foothills

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is endemic to the Philippines, ranging from Samar and Tablas south to Mindanao, Basilan and the Sulu Archipelago. It appears to be locally common on some islands, but it is rare in other localities. It lives in forest below in elevation, being found in coastal lowlands and foothills

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by deforestation, and the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) has assessed it as a vulnerable species

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Forest clearance and illegal logging are causing habitat loss and a fast population decline, so the IUCN has assessed it as a vulnerable species
